interactions.name: Mecamylamine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when 5-(2-methylpiperazine-1-sulfonyl)isoquinoline is combined with Mecamylamine.

interactions.name: Dexketoprofen
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Dexketoprofen is combined with 5-(2-methylpiperazine-1-sulfonyl)isoquinoline.
